new.title: Missing AGENTS.md
new.description: The repo has no AGENTS.md, so coding agents lack a stable project guide.
evidence: AGENTS.md was not found at the repository root.
new.recommendation: Create AGENTS.md with setup, tests, architecture, conventions, and safety rules.
new.subject: AGENTS.md

new.title: No test script in package.json
new.description: Agents cannot reliably run test without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "test".
new.recommendation: Add a package.json "test" script or document the equivalent command clearly.
new.subject: package.json

new.title: package.json has no scripts
new.description: Agents cannot discover standard local workflows from package.json.
evidence: package.json scripts object is empty.
new.recommendation: Add scripts for test, lint, typecheck, build, and local development.
new.subject: package.json

new.title: Missing CLAUDE.md
new.description: Claude Code users do not have a concise project memory file.
evidence: CLAUDE.md was not found at the repository root.
new.recommendation: Add CLAUDE.md with concise workflow, boundaries, and testing expectations.
new.subject: CLAUDE.md

new.title: README.md exists, but does not include architecture or repo map
new.description: A detected agent-facing artifact is missing specific guidance agents need for reliable work.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: architecture, repo structure, packages/, apps/, src/.
new.recommendation: Add architecture or repo map to README.md.
new.subject: README.md

new.title: README.md exists, but does not include clear test command
new.description: A detected agent-facing artifact is missing specific guidance agents need for reliable work.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: test, pnpm test, npm test, pytest, cargo test, go test.
new.recommendation: Add clear test command to README.md.
new.subject: README.md

new.title: Docs exist but no Markdown files are discoverable
new.description: Agents work best when documentation source is available in text formats.
evidence: docs/ exists but no .md or .mdx files were scanned.
new.recommendation: Add Markdown documentation or ensure docs source is not ignored.
new.subject: docs/

new.title: README.md has no examples
new.description: The README is missing a section agents commonly need to orient themselves.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: example, usage, demo.
new.recommendation: Add concrete examples showing expected usage and output.
new.subject: README.md

new.title: README.md has no installation instructions
new.description: The README is missing a section agents commonly need to orient themselves.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: install, pnpm, npm, yarn, pip.
new.recommendation: Add installation commands and prerequisites.
new.subject: README.md

new.title: README.md has no quickstart section
new.description: The README is missing a section agents commonly need to orient themselves.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: quickstart, quick start, getting started.
new.recommendation: Add a quickstart that gets a new user to a working command quickly.
new.subject: README.md

new.title: Missing llms.txt
new.description: The project does not expose a compact, machine-readable map for LLMs and agents.
evidence: llms.txt was not found at the repository root.
new.recommendation: Create llms.txt with links to README, docs, architecture, examples, and API references.
new.subject: llms.txt

new.title: Instructions do not tell agents how to handle secrets
new.description: Agent-facing instructions should state how to avoid exposing secrets or private data.
evidence: No secret/privacy guidance was detected in AGENTS.md.
new.recommendation: Add a security section explaining secret handling and external LLM constraints.
new.subject: AGENTS.md

new.title: Missing .agentlighthouseignore
new.description: Scans should explicitly exclude generated, private, and secret-bearing paths.
evidence: .agentlighthouseignore was not found at the repository root.
new.recommendation: Add .agentlighthouseignore with node_modules, build outputs, env files, secrets, and vendor paths.
new.subject: .agentlighthouseignore

new.title: No lint script in package.json
new.description: Agents cannot reliably run lint without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "lint".
new.recommendation: Add a package.json "lint" script or document the equivalent command clearly.
new.subject: package.json

new.title: No typecheck script in package.json
new.description: Agents cannot reliably run typecheck without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "typecheck".
new.recommendation: Add a package.json "typecheck" script or document the equivalent command clearly.
new.subject: package.json

new.title: Missing agent task benchmark file
new.description: The project has no agentlighthouse.tasks.yaml or benchmark task file.
evidence: No agent task benchmark file was found.
new.recommendation: Add agentlighthouse.tasks.yaml with realistic, verifiable agent workflows.
new.agentFailureMode: A team cannot tell whether agents can complete common workflows because no deterministic task set exists.
new.fixExample: Add tasks for installing the project, running tests, adding a small feature, and using the public API.
new.subject: agentlighthouse.tasks.yaml

new.title: README commands are not clearly grounded in package.json scripts
new.description: Commands are more trustworthy when README examples match executable project scripts.
evidence: No fenced README command references a package.json script such as test, lint, typecheck, dev, or build.
new.recommendation: Show package-manager commands that map directly to package.json scripts.
new.subject: README.md

new.title: README has installation guidance but no verification step
new.description: Agents need a quick command to verify the project works after installation.
evidence: README does not show an obvious test, build, healthcheck, or smoke-test step after installation.
new.recommendation: Add a short verification step such as running tests, typecheck, build, or a health command.
new.subject: README.md

new.title: Docs contain TODO/deprecated-looking terms without migration guidance
new.description: Stale markers can confuse agents unless they include replacement guidance.
evidence: README.md:3: Coming soon.
README.md:5: TODO old setup.
new.recommendation: Resolve TODOs or add explicit migration/replacement guidance.
new.subject: README.md:3: Coming soon.

new.title: OpenAPI file not detected
new.description: No OpenAPI schema was found. This may be fine for projects without an HTTP API.
evidence: No openapi.* or swagger.* file was scanned.
new.recommendation: For API products, publish an OpenAPI spec with operation descriptions and examples.

no openapi.* or swagger.* file was scanned.

unchanged.title: Command verification probes were skipped
unchanged.description: Static analysis is default; project commands are not executed unless explicitly enabled.
evidence: Run with --probe commands or --run-probes to execute safe script probes.
unchanged.recommendation: Use command probes in trusted local or CI environments when you want executable verification.
unchanged.agentFailureMode: Without command probes, AgentLighthouse can tell agents what commands appear to exist, but not whether they currently pass.

run with --probe commands or --run-probes to execute safe script probes.

New high finding: package.json has no scripts

recommendedActions: Fix new high-severity agent-readiness findings before merging.
Compare the changed files with the baseline report and recover lost context.
Create AGENTS.md with setup, tests, architecture, conventions, and safety rules.
Add a package.json "test" script or document the equivalent command clearly.
Add scripts for test, lint, typecheck, build, and local development.
caveats: Different profiles: baseline api, current library.
